commit.message:
v1.2.0: Fix Unicode display, null crash, add version cache invalidation

- Set UTF-8 console encoding at startup so checkmarks/symbols render
  correctly in Windows console
- Replace box-drawing chars (U+2500 -- rendered as 'a') and em dash
  (U+2014) with ASCII equivalents in section headers and mode display
- Guard all .Trim() calls on $lastStderr/$lastOutput with [string] cast;
  PS 5.1 Get-Content -Raw returns null on empty files causing method-on-
  null errors at lines 502/594
- Add version check on startup: if stored version differs, clear only the
  binary cache (keeps the ~5 GB model file), then save new version

commit.message:
Harden security, add production features, and open-source essentials

Security:
- Add SSRF protection (URL validation, block private networks)
- Add file upload size limits (configurable MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE_MB)
- Sanitize error messages (no internal details leaked to clients)
- Add CORS middleware with configurable origins
- Run Docker containers as non-root user

Production:
- Add structured logging throughout all templates
- Add Docker healthchecks with service dependency ordering
- Add .dockerignore to reduce image size
- Add config validation (chunk_size > 0, top_k > 0)
- Upgrade to Pydantic v2 model_config pattern
- Fix mutable default in SourceInfo model
- Add MCP error handling for RAG service failures
- Make MCP port configurable via environment variable

Open Source:
- Add GitHub CI workflow (lint, test CLI, docker build)
- Add issue templates (bug report, feature request, new template)
- Add pull request template
- Add SECURITY.md
- Add CHANGELOG.md

CLI:
- Add --version flag (v0.1.0)
- Add project name validation (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores)
- Add bilingual template descriptions (English + Thai)
- Add EOFError handling in template picker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add BST/GMT season check — skip wrong-season cron fires

Each of the 3 capture times (10pm, midnight, 7am) has two cron
entries: one for GMT, one for BST. The workflow now checks the
current UK timezone offset and skips execution if the cron that
fired belongs to the wrong season. Exactly 3 pushes per day,
no duplicates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style(flutter): dart format — 3 fichiers reformatés

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(Start-CertWebhookListener): rewrite to fix parse error (try-catch-finally syntax)

The original try{while{try{...}catch{}}catch{...}finally{}} nesting caused
PowerShell to fail with "Unexpected token '}'" at the outer catch block.

Rewrote the listener with a flat, parse-verified structure:
- Single outer try/finally (no outer catch — fatal errors surface naturally)
- Simplified request handling without unnecessary nesting
- Replaced Test-NetConnection port check (unreliable as scheduled task) with
  a direct TcpClient.Connect() attempt (pass = port busy, catch = port free)
- Replaced Out-File with Add-Content for log appending
- Used New-Object instead of ::new() for compatibility
- Removed special-character em-dash comments that may trigger encoding issues

Script now passes [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile
with zero errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(collabora): resolve websocket connection failures

Collabora WebSocket connections were failing with path_normalization_failed errors. The WOPI protocol URLs contain encoded slashes which Envoy Gateway was rejecting during path normalization.

Added path normalization configuration to preserve encoded slashes and simplified HTTPRoute configuration.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: 5 HA cluster correctness issues (#185-#189)

#187: xdp_zone NO_NEIGH drops VLAN context — add vlan_iface_map lookup
before check_egress_rg_active() so VLAN subinterfaces resolve to correct
parent ifindex + vlan_id for RG active check.

#189: RGVRRPReady false positive — add hasRETH parameter so VRRP-less
RGs (e.g. RG 0 control-plane) are only considered ready when they
genuinely have no RETH requirement, not just because other RGs have
VRRP instances.

#188: RGInterfaceReady treats missing local interfaces as peer-owned —
use InterfaceSlot() + SlotToNodeID() to determine ownership. Only skip
interfaces confirmed to belong to peer; missing local interfaces now
correctly fail readiness.

#186: Fabric readiness decoupled from takeover gating — add
fabricPopulated check gated on PeerAlive() to prevent promotion before
fabric cross-chassis forwarding is usable.

#185: Zone-RG mapping limitation — remove early break, scan all
interfaces per zone, warn if multiple RGs detected (ambiguous session
sync ownership).

commit.message:
feat: smart client-only mod detection, configurable extra-mod handling

- ModSyncConfig: add disableExtraMods option (default: false)
  Clients may freely have extra mods by default
- ModManifestPacket: include disableExtraMods flag from server config
- ModJarInspector: detect client-only mods via displayTest=IGNORE_SERVER_VERSION
  in META-INF/mods.toml — JEI, minimaps, OptiFine, etc. are never disabled
- ModComparator: new compare() signature with disableExtraMods param
  When false (default): extra client mods are never touched
  When true: extra mods disabled unless detected as client-only
- ClientEventHandler: pass packet.disableExtraMods() to comparator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(soompi): corrigir limpeza do bloco de sharing e fragmentos HTML

- content-cleaner: substituir regex fraca do 'share it on' por truncação
  greedy até fim do conteúdo ([\s\S]*$) — elimina share block, html cru
  e 'Related' de uma vez
- Atualizar padrões fb/twitter/soompi para aceitar whitespace antes de [
  (o markdown convertido tem espaços de indentação antes dos links)
- Atualizar raw html fragments para capturar tags sem '>' de fechamento

  que o preprocessador HTML alcance o bloco de sharing em artigos longos

  usando WordPress REST API (?after=&before=), ignora os já existentes
  no banco e importa os novos com pipeline completo (conteúdo + artistas)
- GET /api/admin/news/import: retorna contagem de artigos disponíveis na
  fonte no período (sem importar)
- UI: botão "Importar novos" aparece junto ao filtro de período; mostra
  quantos artigos estão disponíveis na fonte vs quantos já estão no banco
- SSE streaming com progresso em tempo real (mesmo padrão do reprocess)

commit.message:
Cable system v2.0.2 — grid-by-grid routing + simplified blocking

- Replaced frame-based mouse chase with grid-by-grid vertex tracking
  (cable extends only when mouse crosses grid vertex boundaries)
- Removed entire proximity buffer system (~180 lines):
  proximity_h/v_edges, port_exit_vertices, vertex_near_occupied,
  source_proximity, port exit exemption
- New single blocking rule: _edge_touches_occupied (block if ANY
  adjacent cell is occupied by building/source)
- Added diagonal corner check: is_turn_corner_occupied prevents
  cables from cutting building/source corners on turns
- Visual feedback: valid path renders GREEN, blocked segment to
  mouse renders RED
- Mouse interpolation for fast movement (fills skipped vertices)
- Backtrack support: moving mouse over existing path truncates it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix web build: track engine_log_screen.dart (was gitignored by logs/ pattern)

Changed .gitignore from `logs/` to `/logs/` so it only matches root-level
logs directory, not feature directories like features/logs/.

BLK-001/002/008 — Add unit tests for performClientCredentialsFlow,
refreshAccessToken, and discoverAuthServer. Extends existing oauth4webapi
mock with clientCredentialsGrantRequest and processClientCredentialsResponse.
Tests: 778 → 792 (+14 new tests).

rename (PR #123), reporter UI changes (#110, #121-#125), and doc work
(#126, #128).

so type errors, lint failures, and test failures block publish.

and add mcp_host rename section with before/after examples and grep command.

was removed outright; there is no deprecated alias.

transitive deps (hono, express-rate-limit, minimatch).
